历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6038 → 6067 → 6137 → 7527 → 7186, showing an overall backward trend with significant fluctuations in the last two years. In 2024, it dropped sharply to 7527, then slightly recovered to 7186 in 2025, with a baseline of about 7186 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 21 in 2021, 12 in 2022, and 8 from 2023 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 10, an increase of 25% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 60th in 2026, with a continuous decline from 43rd to 60th in recent years, still at an upper-middle level overall. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper fraud, dean dismissal, etc.), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 48th), with medium-to-high short video exposure. Sociology is rated A, World History A-, with no direct discipline evaluation correspondence to Physics Category enrollment majors (Electronic Information, Electrical), but the overall engineering strength of the school is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also highly recommended, highly consistent with Physics Category enrollment majors, with high social popularity attracting candidates. The estimated number of provincial Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 204,000, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with obvious regional advantages, strongly attracting Fujian candidates. The school has a small enrollment scale in Fujian Province, making ranking changes more sensitive to plan adjustments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7186, the 25% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, an increase of about 6% in Physics Category candidates, high social popularity of Electronic Information/Electrical majors attracting applicants, and the inhibitory effect of negative school reputation, the estimated minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 8284, with a range of 7784–8784.
